contraction_rules.direct: Gd = Sc * trace(Gamma @ Sb @ GammaB @ Sa.T)
contraction_rules.exchange: Gx = Sca @ GammaB.T @ Sb.T @ Gamma.T @ Sac

deliverables: raw contraction tensors or npz reference
notes: This artifact closes the direct-minus-exchange contraction rule for the isospin-symmetric nucleon channel.
What remains open is sequence population on seeded unquenched ensembles, not the algebraic contraction identity itself.
objective: upgrade the stable-channel N_iso readout from direct-term-only to full baryon contractions
